summary: P5+P6: DeepSeek Live-Pfad + Outbound Lead Machine testing completed. Backend: 19/19 tests passed (100%). Fixed 2 bugs during testing: 1) create_contact() signature mismatch in handover endpoint, 2) EmergentGPTProvider LlmChat initialization (model parameter). All P5 LLM Provider endpoints and P6 Outbound Pipeline endpoints working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ P5: GET /api/admin/llm/status — Returns active_provider, providers (deepseek, emergent_gpt52), migration_ready status
✅ P5: POST /api/admin/llm/test — LLM test with optional model override working
✅ P5: DeepSeek provider ready (DEEPSEEK_API_KEY not set, using Emergent fallback)
✅ P6: GET /api/admin/outbound/pipeline — Returns all 16 stages with counts and conversion_rate
✅ P6: POST /api/admin/outbound/{lead_id}/prequalify — Prequalification with suppression check
✅ P6: POST /api/admin/outbound/{lead_id}/analyze — Analysis and fit-scoring working
✅ P6: POST /api/admin/outbound/{lead_id}/legal-check — Legal Gate (DSGVO, UWG) working
✅ P6: POST /api/admin/outbound/{lead_id}/outreach/{id}/send — Send with Legal Guardian gate integrated
✅ P6: GET /api/admin/outbound/{lead_id} — Lead detail with timeline working
✅ P6: POST /api/admin/outbound/{lead_id}/respond — Response tracking (positive→responded, negative→nurture, opt_out→opt_out+suppressed)
✅ P6: POST /api/admin/outbound/{lead_id}/handover — Handover to quote/meeting/nurture working
✅ P6: Handover to quote creates CRM lead in db.leads (FIXED: create_contact signature)
✅ P6: All admin endpoints require authentication (401 without token)
seed_data_creation: Test data created with prefix 'TEST_P6_' for outbound lead testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: P5+P6 fully tested. P5 endpoints: GET /api/admin/llm/status (provider status, migration_ready), POST /api/admin/llm/test (LLM test with model override). P6 endpoints: GET /api/admin/outbound/pipeline (16 stages: discovered, analyzing, qualified, unqualified, legal_blocked, outreach_ready, contacted, followup_1-3, responded, meeting_booked, quote_sent, nurture, opt_out, suppressed), POST /api/admin/outbound/discover, POST /{lead_id}/prequalify, POST /{lead_id}/analyze, POST /{lead_id}/legal-check, POST /{lead_id}/outreach, POST /{lead_id}/outreach/{id}/send (with Legal Guardian gate), GET /{lead_id} (detail with timeline), POST /{lead_id}/respond (positive/negative/opt_out), POST /{lead_id}/handover (quote/meeting/nurture). Response types: positive→responded, negative→nurture, opt_out→opt_out+suppressed. Handover to quote creates CRM lead. Legal Guardian integrated into outreach send.

bugs_fixed.issue: create_contact() called with 3 positional arguments but signature is create_contact(email, **kwargs)
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed to use keyword arguments: create_contact(email, first_name=..., last_name=..., phone=..., company=..., source='outbound')

bugs_fixed.issue: LlmChat.__init__() got unexpected keyword argument 'model' and 'temperature'
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed to use session_id in __init__ and set model via chat.with_model('openai', model) method

mocked_apis.note: DeepSeek API (no key set), Emergent GPT-5.2 (key present, used as fallback). LLM test endpoint returns response from Emergent provider.

p5_llm_provider.test_endpoint: ✅ LLM test with optional model override
p5_llm_provider.env_switching: ✅ LLM_PROVIDER env var controls provider selection

p6_outbound_pipeline.prequalify: ✅ Checks suppression, existing customer, contact info
